pet_notes: Retro desktop pet white cat, warm sunny mood, compact rounded body, black pixel-dot eyes, pale apricot inner ears, tiny warm brown nose, small black triangular bow-tie collar mark close to neck, no long tie, no moustache shape, no ground shadows.
style_notes: Retro early desktop accessory sprite aesthetic, low-resolution clean hand-authored feel, limited warm palette, chunky pixels, minimal shading, no glossy AI mascot polish.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `pixel`: Pixel-art-adjacent digital mascot with a chunky silhouette, simple dark outline, limited palette, flat cel shading, and visible stepped edges. User style notes: Retro early desktop accessory sprite aesthetic, low-resolution clean hand-authored feel, limited warm palette, chunky pixels, minimal shading, no glossy AI mascot polish..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
